name: FirstGroup PLC
description: Leading UK private sector provider of public transport. First Bus operates ~5,800 buses including London. First Rail includes open access (Hull Trains, Lumo) and DfT TOCs. Sold US businesses in 2022.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Adjusted revenue £1,370m in FY2025 (+7.1%). First Bus £1,082m, Adjacent services £271m (+23%), RATP London acquisition (~£300-350m run-rate). Two new open access rail routes expected to add ~£100m by FY2028.
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin 16.3% (FY2024: 16.0%). First Bus 8.9%. First Rail 51.5% (asset-light DfT fee model). Fleet electrification driving efficiencies.
assumptions.risks: DfT TOC contracts transferring to public ownership (reducing rail earnings). London bus onerous contract provision £38m. Net debt £87m (was net cash £64m in FY2024). Bus funding reductions, wage inflation.
assumptions.catalyst: London bus £300-350m revenue at 6-7% margin. New open access routes. Adjacent services growing rapidly. £50m buyback. Progressive dividend (6.5p). ~£120m cash from DfT TOC transitions.
